chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Superiority of the Married Person Over the Unmarried Person

text: 4348 - وَ رُوِيَ أَنَّ رَسُولَ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ قَالَ: "إِنَّ أَرَاذِلَ مَوْتَاكُمُ اَلْعُزَّابُ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.4348 - It is narrated that the Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace be upon him and his family) said: "Indeed, the most despicable of your dead are the unmarried."
